paper_focus.title: Microstructure and mechanical properties of a Fe–30Mn–10Al–1.5C–xBe (x = 0, 0.5, 1.0, 1.5) Be low-density steels
paper_focus.research_objective: To study the effect of beryllium (0–1.5 wt%) on the microstructural evolution and mechanical properties of Fe–30Mn–10Al–1.5C low-density steel and to achieve further density reduction while maintaining high specific strength.
main_process_variables: processing route: as-cast and hot rolling at 1050 °C
